topStories.description: Pakistan's Deputy PM Ishaq Dar visits China after Islamabad talks to broker negotiations between the US and Iran.

dailyNews.title: Defeat Congress candidate in Davangere, Ashok tells Muslims
dailyNews.description: The Leader of Opposition says Samarth Mallikarjun’s victory in the bypolls will deny Muslims Congress ticket for the next 50 years

dailyNews.title: Iran will play World Cup games in US despite war, FIFA’s Infantino says
dailyNews.description: The chief of global football's governing body says US-Israeli war on Iran will not affect scheduling of  2026 World Cup.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court rejects Colorado's ban on LGBT ‘conversion talk’ therapy
dailyNews.description: The US Supreme Court on Tuesday (local time) rejected a Colorado law that prohibited psychotherapists from using ‘conversion’ talk therapy, aimed at changing a Lesbian Gay Bisexual Transgender (LGBT) minor's sexual orientation or identity, Reuters reported.

dailyNews.title: Brinda Karat blasts Congress, Rahul Gandhi
Don’t forgive Congress that treated Assam in step-motherly manner: Rajnath
dailyNews.description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh accused Congress of neglecting Assam and urged voters to reject them in the April 9 election, highlighting BJP's development efforts.

dailyNews.title: Jon Stewart mocks Donald Trump’s conduct, calls him ‘grandpa who’s lost his filter in public’
dailyNews.description: The Daily Show host Jon Stewart has criticised US President Donald Trump’s recent public conduct, comparing it to an unfiltered elderly relative rather than a wartime leader. His remarks come amid scrutiny of Trump’s messaging and leadership during an ongoing crisis.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day on positive thinking by Norman Vincent Peale: ‘Change your thoughts and you change your world’
dailyNews.description: This quote is personal. It tells us that we may not be able to control everything that happens around us, but we can control how we think about it. That is where it all starts.

dailyNews.title: War on Iran: US’s history of making other nations pay for conflicts
dailyNews.description: White House says Trump could ask Arab nations to bear the cost of the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Come close, we're waiting: Iran dares US as Trump weighs ground op -
dailyNews.description: Come close were waiting Iran dares US as Trump weighs ground op

dailyNews.title: Cancer drug facility, religious site hit in Israeli-US strikes on Iran
dailyNews.description: The Iranian government said the company's drug production line has been damaged, as no diplomatic solution is in sight.

dailyNews.title: Palm Beach Airport, Penn Station, John F Kennedy Center: A list of things Trump has renamed after himself
dailyNews.description: The latest addition to the landmarks renamed after US President Donald Trump is Palm Beach International Airport. On Monday, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a bill to rename the airport. Here's a list of things that have been renamed since Trump came back to office.

dailyNews.title: Will China join Pakistan-led efforts to mediate US-Iran peace?
dailyNews.description: Pakistan's Deputy PM Ishaq Dar visits China after Islamabad talks to broker negotiations between the US and Iran.

dailyNews.title: BJP's 4th Bengal list: Union minister's wife, ex-Congress leader among 13 candidates
dailyNews.description: With this, BJP has named 287 candidates for the race to the 294-member state assembly

dailyNews.title: Oil shock: US fuel prices soar over $4 per gallon — highest since 2022 as conflict with Iran continues
dailyNews.description: Since the US and Israel carried out strikes on Iran in late February, petrol prices have jumped by more than 30%, AAA data showed. Meanwhile, diesel prices crossed $5 per gallon mark on March 17 with the current rates over 40% higher than they were before the conflict - reports state

dailyNews.title: NASA Artemis II launch LIVE Updates: Countdown begins, Canadian astronaut calls mission ‘a huge deal’
dailyNews.description: NASA Artemis II launch LIVE Updates: The NASA and the United States are making a strong comeback in their lunar exploration programme — nearly 50 years after the Apollo missions. Stay tuned to this LIVE blog for all the latest updates on Artemis II mission.

dailyNews.title: US defence secretary says next few days in Iran war will be ‘decisive’
dailyNews.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warned the coming days of the war with Iran will be ‘decisive.'

dailyNews.title: Google is now letting users in the US change their Gmail address
dailyNews.description: Users will be able to change their username only once every 12 months. Plus, they won't be able to delete their new email address for that period of time.

dailyNews.title: ‘This is not solely an American matter’: Ro Khanna calls on King Charles to meet Epstein survivors during US visit
dailyNews.description: Democratic Congressman Ro Khanna urged King Charles III to meet the survivors of the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein during his possible visit to the US. Khanna, in his letter, mentioned that Epstein's network was not limited to the US and his social circle was spread across the UK.

dailyNews.title: Artemis 2: Houston, we have a new moon mission — The ‘Twin Sister of Apollo’
dailyNews.description: Before reaching Mars, NASA wants a pit stop at the darker, colder side of the Moon — “the lunar South Pole” — and the Artemis program is a path towards that goal. Here's A to Z of the United States latest moon mission.

dailyNews.title: Iran, Khamenei get a surprise Indian backer in war against US & Israel — Baba Ramdev
dailyNews.description: Ramdev says in viral clip: "[Trump and Netanyahu] are war criminals. I consider them criminals against humanity; criminals against nature and environment.”

dailyNews.title: Iranian rescuers save two civilians from rubble after US-Israeli strikes
dailyNews.description: Footage shows Iranian Red Crescent Society rescuers and firemen saving two civilians from underneath the rubble.

dailyNews.title: NYC Dem, Hochul aide under investigation over alleged migrant shelter bribes
dailyNews.description: Federal prosecutors are reportedly probing whether NYC Council member Farah Louis and a top Hochul aide accepted bribes tied to migrant shelter contracts.

dailyNews.title: John Harbaugh dishes on potential Giants reunion with Odell Beckham Jr
dailyNews.description: New York Giants coach John Harbaugh talked about the possibility of a reunion with free agent wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr., saying the team will look at every option.

dailyNews.title: Pelosi won't say if Democrats will impeach Trump if they retake power, but leaves door open
dailyNews.description: Nancy Pelosi declined to say whether Democrats would pursue impeaching Trump if they regain power, saying the decision is up to a new Congress to make.

topStories.title: Democrats pounce on $4 a gallon gas, blame Trump’s Iran war for ‘broken promise’
topStories.description: Gas prices topping $4 per gallon, driven by the Iran war, are another broken promise by Trump, Rep. Suzan DelBene claims, as Democrats target GOP on costs.

topStories.title: Deaths in ICE Custody Are Growing, and Trump Defends Ballroom Plans
topStories.description: Plus, a three-minute, multimillion-dollar art heist.

topStories.title: Trump Faces a Decision on Whether to Start a Ground War in Iran
topStories.description: The president wants a negotiation, but the Iranians say they are refusing until a cease-fire is declared. And while Marines and the 82nd Airborne Division offer new leverage, the risks escalate quickly.

topStories.title: U.S. Gas Prices Hit $4 a Gallon on Average, a ‘Headache’ for Drivers and Trump
topStories.description: A month since the first U.S.-Israeli attacks and Iran’s response effectively shut off Persian Gulf oil, drivers are paying significantly more to fill up.

topStories.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
topStories.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.

topStories.title: Edward Russo Says Donald Trump Is an ‘Environmental Hero’
topStories.description: Edward Russo, the only member of a White House task force, thinks the president doesn’t get enough credit for conservation at his golf courses, among other things.

dailyNews.title: Trump Posts Video of Presidential Library in Miami
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted a video rendering that appeared to include elements generated by artificial intelligence of a skyscraper in Miami featuring what appeared to be Air Force One.

dailyNews.title: For Trump, the Artemis II Moon Mission Offers a Shot to Cement His Legacy
dailyNews.description: No president since the Apollo era has pushed harder to return to the moon than President Trump. But he wants a space achievement that is about “more than getting rocks this time.”

dailyNews.title: Medicaid cuts threaten hundreds of hospitals, new report finds
dailyNews.description: More than 400 hospitals across the United States are at high risk of closing or cutting services because of the Medicaid cuts in President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” according to an analysis from the progressive watchdog group Public Citizen

dailyNews.title: Ex-FBI agents who worked on Trump 2020 probe sue Patel, Bondi over their firing
dailyNews.description: The three former agents were seasoned investigators who primarily handled public corruption investigations and were assigned to special counsel Jack Smith's team.

dailyNews.title: Iranian in Tehran reacts to Trump's war as more violence erupts
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media a video of apparent strikes in Isfahan, a key Iranian city, as Iranians cope with the war and the regime's stance on the drawn-out conflict. CBS News' Holly Williams reports.

dailyNews.title: Gas price rises as Trump mulls dropping bid to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump indicates he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as the war pushes U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump lashes out at UK and France, telling allies 'the U.S.A. won't be there to help you anymore'
dailyNews.description: Trump re-upped his disdain for European allies that have refused to take part in the U.S. and Israel's military operation against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Army investigates helicopter flyby at Kid Rock's Nashville home
dailyNews.description: Kid Rock is a leading supporter of President Donald Trump, the subject of "No Kings" demonstrations around the U.S. on the day the helicopters showed up.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Israel and Gulf states report new Iranian strikes, tanker hit
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Florida Gov. DeSantis signs bill to rename Palm Beach airport after Trump
dailyNews.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a bill Monday renaming Palm Beach International Airport to the President Donald J. Trump International Airport.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  ‘No Kings’ protests around the country
dailyNews.description: Across the country, millions of people attend “No Kings” protests, calling out President Donald Trump and his administration’s policies, including Bruce Springsteen.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
